meaning: n.[生化]分解体(分解已败死的原生质之有机体)
examples: It normally starts with a producer, followed by series of consumers and ends with a decomposer.
The OTDAS optimally decompose the task of power plant control system through an optimizer agent and a decomposer agent.
Tests and application results indicate that a decomposer can remarkably improve cement slurry properties and cementing qualities.
